chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1247 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 13.12.2023 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Bango, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents No.2 & 3. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents has filed a schedule undertaking that entire commutation of petitioner would be paid in two equal installments on 5th February, 2024 and 5th May, 2024 respectively. Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied, and accordingly, this petition in above terms is disposed of, however the default in payment would expose defaulter to contempt proceedings. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
